results.name: Pakistan
results.key_finding: Post-band-crossing watch cycle 1 confirms 17.5 / critical. NDMA pre-monsoon preparedness noted as positive sub-threshold AWR/A5 offset; no further downward movement; monsoon weather May 13-17 watch window open.

results.name: Hungary
results.key_finding: BAND CROSSING developing → functional (37.5 → 41.4). Boundary-case at 0.4 above functional floor (41). Magyar-era first operational baseline; enacted day-1/2 actions credited (16-minute cabinet decentralization, three new ministries, May 13 first cabinet meeting, comprehensive audit + payment suspension, ICC reversal). Conservative-rounding methodology pins composite at 41.4 from reconstructed 43.0.

results.name: Sudan
results.key_finding: Floor sustained at 0.0. New conduct categories: drone warfare as primary civilian-kill mechanism (80%+ of deaths, 880+ killed); UN HRC fact-finding mission documentation; Banjul Joint Declaration (May 12) condemnation; RSF violations 'particularly widespread and systematic.'

results.name: Israel
results.key_finding: Floor sustained at 0.0. New conduct: MSF manufactured-malnutrition crisis (50% pregnant women malnourished, 90% babies premature, 84% low birth weight); 2,000+ ceasefire violations milestone; UNRWA 14-month block; Hungary ICC reversal as external INT-dimension accountability signal narrowing Israeli leadership travel footprint.

results.name: xAI/Grok
results.key_finding: Floor sustained at 0.0. Multi-jurisdictional regulatory enforcement cluster documented (UK ICO, UK Ofcom, EU DSA, California AG Bonta + AB 621, 35-state coalition, xAI v. Colorado AI Act litigation with DOJ intervention under EO 14365, Canada Privacy Commissioner, Brazil) — 8+ jurisdictions, densest in AI Labs floor record. Anti-regulatory litigation posture sustained. Scanner's 'never assessed' framing corrected (canonical state is rank 50 floor, floorDesignation April 30 2026).

results.name: Nigeria
results.key_finding: Rotation-backfill confirm at 23.4 / developing. Math-hygiene resolution from May-05 baseline applied on data side (canonical now matches reconstructed); developing-band placement canonical. Scanner's reported 18.4 was stale.

results.name: Apptronik
results.key_finding: Confirm at 81.4 / exemplary (boundary case at 0.4 above threshold). Math-hygiene +8.0 discrepancy re-asserted (published 81.4 vs reconstructed 73.4) — largest in robotics-labs cluster. No new material score-moving evidence in current cycle.

results.name: Agility Robotics
results.key_finding: Confirm at 60.9 / established. Compound-positive baseline (Toyota Canada Feb 2026 RaaS deployment, 2022 anti-weaponization pledge, ASTM safety-standards leadership) sustained. ASTM May 27-28 Boston convening to be watched in next cycles.

results.name: Cambodia
results.key_finding: First agent baseline confirm at 12.5 / critical. Amnesty Jan 2026 scam-compound evidence (53 active compounds, 100K-150K trafficked workers regionally) + HRW 2026 + TIP Tier 3 + Hun Manet authoritarian succession context anchored. Math reconstruction clean. Scanner's reported 7.5 was stale.

results.name: Russia
results.key_finding: Floor sustained at 0.0. Day 2 of post-format-offensive-surge: 100+ drones May 13, 8+ killed in civilian-area barrage, railway/civilian-site deliberate targeting, Kremlin 'special military operation is continuing.' Complete bad-faith ceasefire-format cycle documented across May 9-13.

results.name: Myanmar
results.key_finding: Floor sustained at 0.0. Day-2 update on May 12 Oe Htein Kwin / Depayin school airstrike: death toll rose to 25 (2 additional grade 2/3 students died from injuries May 14); ~100 children studying at strike time; 100+ wounded; one of deadliest attacks on children since 2021 coup. Fortify Rights + Malaysia aviation-fuel embargo call documented as new external-accountability category.

notable_findings: Hungary BAND CROSSING developing → functional (37.5 → 41.4); boundary-case at 0.4 above functional floor; Magyar-era first operational baseline; ICC reversal (carry-over to Israel as cross-cluster collateral)
xAI multi-jurisdictional regulatory enforcement cluster (8+ jurisdictions) is the densest in the AI Labs floor record
Russia complete bad-faith ceasefire-format cycle documented across May 9-13 (prepare + strike night 1 + sustain night 2)
Myanmar May 12 school airstrike death toll rose to 25 — one of the deadliest attacks on children since 2021 coup
Sudan UN HRC drone-warfare evidence (80%+ civilian deaths) + Banjul Joint Declaration (May 12) new conduct categories
Israel MSF manufactured-malnutrition crisis + 2,000+ ceasefire violations milestone + Hungary ICC reversal as external accountability signal
Apptronik math-hygiene +8.0 discrepancy remains the largest in robotics-labs cluster — data-team escalation
scanner_corrections_applied: Nigeria: scanner reported 18.4, canonical 23.4 (math-hygiene resolution from May-05 applied on data side)
xAI/Grok: scanner labeled 'never assessed' — canonical state is rank 50 floor 0.0 with floorDesignation April 30 2026; corrected to floor-entity conduct doc update
